feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Analytics Cloud
feed.subtitle: SAP Analytics Cloud Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: SAC - Set StoryFilter via Table
entry.content:
Hello,

is it possible to set the StoryFilter via Table cell selection?

Expected result:

Actual result:

I used the following script for the on select event for the table:

Application.getFileDataSource("").setDimensionFilterWithHierarchy("ID_FIRMA",Alias.FlatHierarchy,this.getSelections()[0]["ID_FIRMA"]);

 

The problem here is that the story filter is set to one element according to the selection. All other filter values are not visible anymore.

 

Kr

Ben

entry.title: How to use dimension or measure as a filter in second story?
entry.content:
Hi,

I'm trying to join two stories but I want to use record from the tables from first story as a filter for second story.
In the second story I have prompts on the start and I'm wondering if I can put my chosen record as a value in the prompts?

As below, I put the hyperlink to External URL(second story), but when I go there, that what I see is dependence of what I choose in prompts. The filter is not working.


Is there any option to apply that as a one of the filter in prompts? Maybe some script?

Thank you in advance for your help.

entry.title: Using SAC Excel addin. Confusion on prices.
entry.content:
Hello Guys 

I am little confused on SAC excel addin pricing
I've got several info regarding pricing that it's got additional price but I also read infos like this that there are no additional pricing for the addin.

https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-q-a/sap-analytics-cloud-add-in-prices/qaq-p/12283372

Could you please help me out what is the current state. Apart from the SAC user license do I need any other additional payment in order to use the addin ?

Thanks Andris

entry.title: SAP Analytics Cloud Broadcasting Stories
entry.content:
Hi - Is there a way to broadcast a story/report in SAC and to be sent daily/weekly to a set of email addresses?

Is this possible? If so, is there a guide available? Currently, we are using the SAC tenant that is part of SMC.

Cheers,

Marc

entry.title: Difference between two (dynamic) years in SAC table
entry.content:
Hi,

I created a 'subtract' column by right click on the two year columns (2021 & 2022) and then 'Add client calculation'/Subtract as in the ss1. These two years are displayed based on variable selection i made as shown in the ss2. 

Now the issue is when i change values for variable 'FM: Budget Period' the 'substract' field position is disturbed and also the 'substract' doesnt work as displayed in ss3.

i want the 'subtract' to work as expected and its position shouldnt change if i select two other 'FM: Budget Period'. Lets say 2019 & 2020. User will always select two consecutive years. Basically he is trying to compare/find difference in budget amount between two years. How to achieve this?

Datasphere model is used for this story. The model is built using ECC remote tables.

PS: Data type of field 'FM: Budget Period' is string(10) in the datasphere model.

entry.title: Story filter becomes open for user modification after being altered with script api
entry.content:
I have a filter in my story where I disabled "Allow viewers to modify selection" checkbox. 
Instead, I update this filter on a click of a button, with the script API similar to this:

 

var currentFilters = cast(Type.MultipleFilterValue, var_FDS.getDimensionFilters("CHANNEL")[0]);
	
currentFilters.values.push("another_channel");

var_FDS.setDimensionFilterWithHierarchy("CHANNEL", "HIER_1", currentFilters);

 

It works as expected (adding another channel to the channel filter), but after the execution the filter becomes editable by the users. As if the "Allow viewers to modify selection" checkbox was selected.

I think it might be a bug in SAP Analytics Cloud. Does anyone know how to avoid it?

entry.title: Text in a pop up showing edit cursor on hovering in SAC. How to change it to a click cursor?
entry.content: I have created a landing page where text box on the home page is showing a hand cursor on hover, but when I'm hovering on the text box of a pop up, it shows the edit cursor(like a big capital I sign). How can I change it to a hand or a normal cursor?

entry.title: Line Limit in Stories -SAC
entry.content:
Hi!

When selecting all months in the filter in the story, this message appears:


"Processing on the backend was interrupted due to too high a volume of data involved in intermediate calculations. To reduce data volume, check the following options:

1. Reduce the number of dimensions on the axes.

2. Reduce the number of exception aggregation dimensions.

3. Reduce the number of measurements/counts requested.

4. Add restrictive filters for dimensions that lie on an axis and/or for dimensions that can be, directly or indirectly, used as an exception aggregation dimension."

 

What should I do to unlimited the number of lines in the story in SAC planning?

entry.title: SAC - Blending Support in Optimized Design Mode, BW live modells
entry.content:
hi,

is it now possible to blend BW live models in optimized Design Mode?

i tried it with the new release, but it still doesn't works.

somebody has maybe a hint?

The "blending" seems to be possible only with a chart object and not with table object, is it right?

When using a chart object with the blending scenario, why i have to add the the link dimension into the object to display this chart?  

br Oliver

entry.title: Issue with Edm.Date Handling in OData V4 for Analytics Cloud
entry.content:
Hello,

I am using OData V4 with the Edm.Date type.

However, when integrating with Analytics Cloud and creating a dataset from a data source by choosing OData as the connection, the Edm.Date fields are being handled as strings instead of as proper date objects.

Connection:  odata v4

As shown in the screenshot, the Edm.Date fields appear as strings in Analytics Cloud;

 Cds model Types : 

Analytics Cloud Version:

 

Somebody has maybe a hint?

Best regards,

Saif

entry.title: how can I have a dynamic text with dimension input control on analytic application designer ?
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

I want to have a dynamic title table or text according toa dimension input control on my storie page on analitycs application designer.

The problem is when I press on "add dynamic text" I can only choose filter and not my input control ?

So, how can I have a dynamic text with input control on analytics application designer? A little context on the problem, I want to add the text on a popup window. I already sorted out the popup window.

Thanks for your Help !

#SAC #AnalyticsApp

entry.title: how to select multiple dimension from a dropdown
entry.content:
Hi 

i have to create a dropdown where i can add or remove Dimension to the table or chart.

A Brief: I have one dropdown within that it should show all the available dimensions, so that now i can select multiple dimension to add or else remove the dimension that are in the table or chart

please help me with this

entry.title: Activating SAC on BTP
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

 

where can I find a step-by-step guide to activate the SAC subaccount on BTP?

 

 

thanks

Antonio

entry.title: Compare average of sales person to global average
entry.content:
I have the following requirement in an SAP Analytics Cloud + Datasphere environment.

1. I calculated the average value of revenue of new customers per sales person. So far so good

2. I calculated the average value of revenue of new customers all sales people.

Now I want to compare how much the average of a particular sales person differs from the company average. I also need it be able the change the particular sales person via a filter.

For example:

Percentage of revenue of new customers of sales person: 5%

Percentage of revenue of new customers average for all sales people: 7%

Difference: 2%

I want these three numbers to be shown in a chart.

What I really need is create a calculated measure for average [new customer revenue] per sales person with a constant selection. So that it ignores any filters for sales person. But constant selection is only available as a restricted measure?!

entry.title: Variance delta symbol
entry.content: Hi, I have created a KPI below to show the number of compliments for a particular period. Underneath, I have a variance comparing it to the previous period. Is there a way I can change the delta symbol to something else? Many thanks

entry.title: SAC - Scale percentage in the model
entry.content:
Hi All,

in my analytic model can I set the scale "percentage" for a measure?

For example I have this calculation in the model , but I don't find the way to set as percentageeee:

the only way I've found is:

1. Create a formula in the story that links to this measure

2. Formatting this formula in the settings

I'd like to avoid to create a formula, but I don't understand if I nee to do something in the model or in the story.

 

Thanks

entry.title: Balance carryforward of actual data from SAP to SAC Planning system
entry.content:
Hi All,

We are using the standard CDS view `IFIACTPLNJEIC` to extract accounting data from SAP S/4HANA into SAP Analytics Cloud (SAC) within a planning model via the "Import Connection" feature in the "New Model Type Using Account Dimension."

In SAC, we display the balance sheet and profit/loss statements based on this accounting data, and the business subsequently performs planning activities within SAC.

For balance sheet, it is essential to have balance carryforward data from one year to the next year to show the balances correctly.

Currently, our option is to manually load the ACDOCA-BTTYPE = RFBC` (balance carryforward) transaction data through Data Management -> Import Jobs in the model. However, due to the large volume of data (more than 100 million) in RFBC, I am looking for a more efficient way to obtain balance carryforward data in SAC planning models for subsequent years.

The main question is: How can we effectively load balance carryforward data from SAP to SAC?

Given that `RFBC involves a significant data volume, is there a more efficient method to carry forward transactions from one fiscal year to the next in SAC?

For example, while viewing the balance sheet how can we carry forward inventory balances from FY 2023 to FY 2024 in SAC, so that if a user only selects May 2024, he can view the cumulative balance, i.e., sum of entries posted in FY 2023 + April/May 2024. 

@N1kh1l @SarauShen @hartmut_koerner SAP Analytics Cloud SAP Analytics Cloud for planning please let me know your thoughts on this.

 

Best regards,
Gavin.

entry.title: SAC Application designer story blended models/lined dimensions
entry.content:
I have a story built in SAC application designer which has a table chart using blended models. When I click on any cell on the table chart, I get this error. The data is displayed fine but any clicks on the table chart throw's this error.  Its a simple table chart, dimension and measure columns are from different models. Any ideas? Thank you!!

"[Application Error]:Cannot read properties of null (reading 'getDatasetId')
Correlation ID: 21192195-9278-4171-9946-442125091323 "

entry.title: In SAC, using the Data Export API, how do I export the dimension hierarchies?
entry.content:
Hello everyone.

I have the Data Export working so I can export all the dimension members.   I'm using this endpoint:

/providers/{NamespaceID}/{ProviderID}/{DimensionName}Master | SAP Help Portal

I can get almost everything I need but I cannot see the hierarchies.  How do get those?  Is it from a different endpoint?  I looked through all the endpoints in the documentation it's not really obvious. I could try each in turn but I thought I'd ask before doing that.  

Thanks.

entry.title: SAC Calculate after aggregation based on datasphere
entry.content:
Dear Expert,

   I am trying to calculate the difference of GP% between current year and last year. But the formula behave kind of weird. Here is our sample data:

We have calculated the GP% for 2024/08 and 2024/07 in the Analytic Model of Datasphere and it worked just fine(Green). But when it come to SAC story to calculate difference of 2 years, instead of simply minus one from the other, it seem to firstly calculate the difference of each SALES/COST/GP(Orange) and then calculate GP/SALES(Red) which is wrong. What we need is the calculation after aggregation which is just simply 0.42 - 0.37. 

Any suggestion?

We are using live connection from SAC to Datasphere, I've tried to create calculated measures both in the view and analytic model but neither of them worked.
